_doc: Committed golden-master baselines for tests/table_ro_eval.test.js. table fixtures use minScore (TEDS must be >=); reading-order fixtures use maxDistance (normalized edit distance must be <=). Re-baseline ONLY after a deliberate, reviewed improvement. Synthetic baselines are loose placeholders; tighten per-item once real OmniDocBench / Canvas-captured ground truth lands.

synthetic-emit-header-row.note: deterministic emitter must preserve cells/spans/text exactly

synthetic-captured-borderless-rowspan.note: captured vision output; one-cell tolerance on a ~13-node tree
